case_title: ROBERT PRITCHARD VS. JARED CARR et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARR, JARED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 O'FARRELL ST. #15, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT SERVED JUL-15-2002, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF CLERK' JUDGMENT RE LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.23 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHARD, ROBERT SERVED JUL-13-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, JARED
